textByHash.0e2973e3b123f1b1d10559b862671d01d5a79872: Friend of mine lives at the palace, actually. Well, I say friend. Used to be a friend.
textByHash.1bf0a3181438deb0b2b30f270fc9f59afac3173e: You stole a boot from my master.
textByHash.25a60dc3e8534e1e49dda9bad67628791b948ebb: He got adopted by Hreidmar. The director of the Red Axe.
textByHash.3ba8b154638785dbf37edc39ea6a19ef77f93fbc: I don't like the Red Axe! They stomp around everywhere, got to be careful of your tail with those people around.
